ksa_text: Skill in conducting data compliance gap assessments against specific regulatory frameworks, producing findings with evidence references and prioritized remediation recommendations.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-S-001 (Risk and Compliance/Skill) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.431, highest: EU AI Act at 0.431). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. AI product management: AI/ML feature strategy, model deployment decisions, responsible AI in products, AI product roadmap, and cross-functional AI feature delivery.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.431, and Risk and Compliance (RC) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Risk and Compliance KSA for AI Product Manager?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Risk and Compliance competencies do not appear as AI Product Manager requirements in job postings. They are allocated to specialist roles. Exclusion consistent with market patterns.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld by market evidence. Risk and Compliance is not a AI Product Manager core competency. Final decision: exclude.
